query:
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(rd.date, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS pending_dates,
  COUNT(DISTINCT r.employee_id) AS employees_affected
FROM request_dates rd
JOIN requests r ON r.id = rd.request_id
JOIN employees e ON e.id = r.employee_id
LEFT JOIN request_date_decisions rdd ON rdd.request_id = rd.request_id AND rdd.date = rd.date
WHERE r.status != 'withdrawn'
  AND e.is_active = 1
  AND e.role != 'ancillary'
  AND r.request_type = 'vacation'
  AND rdd.decision IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(rd.date, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;

JOIN requests r ON r.id = rd.request_id
